_comment: Scraping configuration. All adapters read this file at startup via loadScrapingConfig().
_comment_bricodepot: bricodepot.fr returns 403 if requests arrive faster than ~10 s apart. Keep delayBetweenRequestsMs >= 10000. Firefox UA confirmed working (2026-03-21).
